name: Skanör-Falsterbo Coast
description: Quiet beaches, birdwatching and charming cafes along Sweden's southern tip.
tip: Take the Öresundståg from Lund and explore the coastal trail.

name: Ystad Sandskog
description: Hidden dunes close to the coast with walkable forest trails and picnic spots.
tip: Bring a picnic and plan a sunset walk by the sea.

name: Cesky Krumlov
description: Medieval river town with boutique hotels, castle views and quiet winding streets.
tip: Book a local guesthouse and explore the castle gardens early in the morning.
